name: platform-assessment
description: Discover and assess platform-engineering and Agentic Developer Portal maturity.

interface.longDescription: Discover organizational signals across communications, meetings, work, code, infrastructure, and sentiment; assess platform and agent maturity; and design an evidence-backed Agentic Developer Portal roadmap.
defaultPrompt: Discover our platform and ADP readiness from organizational evidence.
Design our Agentic Developer Portal target architecture.
